findings.text: Major | style — slide 2 body — body text #CCCCCC on #FFFFFF fails WCAG AA contrast (<3:1) — WCAG 2.1 AA contrast — Increase body color to #595959 or darker
findings.rationale: Body text contrast ratio of approximately 1.6:1 falls below WCAG AA's 4.5:1 threshold for normal text, making the bullet illegible to standard-vision readers in projection settings.
findings.fix: Darken body fill to #595959 (achieves >7:1 on white) or #767676 minimum

slides.title: Revenue grew 40% in Q3 from enterprise renewals

findings.text: Minor | defect — slide 3 bullet — bullet x-position offset ~12pt off the body grid — Layout grid (DECK-VDA pass 2) — Snap bullet to the body column origin x=0.8in
findings.rationale: Bullet x=0.97in vs. expected grid origin 0.8in (~12pt drift) creates a visible misalignment with the title and other body shapes; perceptible jitter on a slide that otherwise reads clean.
findings.fix: Snap bullet x to the body column origin (0.8in) so the left edges align with the title shape
